allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8650 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8650 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Expand OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; '\\''stopped '\\''+$_ }')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8650 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "netsh advfirewall firewall add rule 'name=Audio Research Assistant 8600' dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=8600 profile=any")
